# LoopStack AI — UK AI Automation Consultant
> LoopStack is a UK-based AI automation consultant that builds custom AI workflows, intelligent chatbots, and automation systems for businesses. We eliminate manual work through AI — and hand over working systems you own outright.

## About LoopStack
LoopStack AI is an AI automation consultancy registered in England and Wales, serving businesses across the United Kingdom. We build custom automation workflows using Make, Zapier, n8n, OpenAI GPT-4, and Anthropic Claude. All projects are fixed-price and clients own all deliverables on completion.

## Services
- **AI Workflow Automation**: End-to-end automation using Make (formerly Integromat), Zapier, and n8n. Connects business applications and eliminates repetitive manual tasks.
- **AI Chatbots and Agents**: Custom-trained AI assistants for customer support, lead qualification, and 24/7 client communication using ChatGPT and Claude.
- **Document Intelligence**: AI extraction and routing of data from invoices, contracts, emails, and application forms — zero manual data entry.
- **CRM and Sales Automation**: Automated lead enrichment, follow-up sequences, and data sync across HubSpot, Salesforce, and Pipedrive.
- **ChatGPT and Generative AI Consulting**: Integration of large language models (LLMs) into business workflows, including document processing, internal knowledge bases, and customer support automation.
- **Custom API Integrations**: Bespoke integrations connecting software platforms that don't natively communicate.

## Pricing
- Starter: £997 one-time — single workflow automation, up to 3 integrations, 2 weeks support
- Growth: £2,497 one-time — multi-step automation suite with AI component, unlimited integrations, 4 weeks support, team training
- Retainer: £799/month — ongoing automation management, monthly new build, monitoring and maintenance

## Key Facts
- First automation deployed within 48 hours of scoping
- Starter projects delivered in 5–7 working days
- Growth projects delivered in 2–4 weeks
- Clients own all workflows, code, credentials, and documentation on delivery
- No vendor lock-in — clients can maintain or transfer automations independently
- UK-based team, GDPR-aware
